scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/public/tailwind.input.css -o src/public/styles.css --watch & NODE_ENV=development bun --watch src/server.ts
scripts.dev:panel: NODE_ENV=development bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/public/tailwind.input.css -o src/public/styles.css --watch & NODE_ENV=development bun --watch src/panel/server.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun build src/server.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.build:panel: bun run build:css && bun build src/panel/server.ts --outdir dist --target bun --outfile dist/panel.js
scripts.build:node: bun build src/node/main.ts --outdir dist --target bun --outfile dist/node.js
scripts.build:binary: bun run build:css && bun build src/server.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-link
scripts.build:binary:panel: bun run build:css && bun build src/panel/server.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-link-panel
